# SCM & Code Review

| Tool | Level | Status |
|------|-------|--------|
| Git | Expert | 🔄 Revising |
| Gerrit | Expert | ⬜ Pending |
| GitLab | Advanced | ⬜ Pending |
| GitHub | Advanced | ⬜ Pending |
| Bitbucket | Intermediate | ⬜ Pending |

## Key Competencies

- Git internals (objects, refs, reflog, packfiles)
- Branching strategies (GitFlow, trunk-based, release branches)
- Gerrit code review workflows, submit rules, and access control
- Repository governance and migration (Bitbucket → Gerrit)
- Monorepo and multi-repo management
- Git security (signed commits, credential management)
